minorObservations: FR-5: imagetracerjs loaded in-process via require() rather than as a child subprocess — functionally correct, deviates from PRD wording.
Root node_modules/commander (v12) is now unused; can be removed with npm uninstall commander at project root.
program.outputHelp() in the error catch block may produce cosmetically redundant output alongside commander's own error message.

Created cli/package.json with commander ^14.0.0 and ran npm install
Wired opts.style into effectivePrompt forwarded to generate.py (US-004 fix)
